case_title: BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC., VS. BETH'S COMMUNITY KITCHEN LLC, A CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC., A CORPORATION DBA BIRITE FOODSERVICE DISTRIBUTORS SERVED AUG-05-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BETH'S COMMUNITY KITCHEN LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BETH'S COMMUNITY KITCHEN

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER OF DEFENDANT BETH'S COMMUNITY KITCHEN LLC IS OFF CALENDAR. A NOTICE OF THE RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER HEARING MUST BE SERVED ON THE DEFENDANT AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. (CCP SECS. 484.040, 1005(A)(1) & (B).) FURTHER, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE IS NOT DEEMED COMPLETE UNTIL THE 10TH DAY AFTER MAILING. (CCP SEC. 415.20.) THE PROOF OF SERVICE STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS SERVED BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON AUGUST 5, 2014, AND THEREFORE INSUFFICIENT NOTICE WAS PROVIDED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH X, AND EACH OF THEM, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC., A CORPORATION DBA BIRITE FOODSERVICE DISTRIBUTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BETH'S COMMUNITY KITCHEN LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA BETH'S COMMUNITY KITCHEN SETRAKIAN, BETH INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA BETH'S COMMUNITY KITCHEN $4,585.00 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $78.12 INTEREST, $555.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,018.12, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-19-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC.'s APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER OF DEFENDANT BETH'S COMMUNITY KITCHEN LLC is Off calendar. A Notice of the Right to Attach Order hearing must be served on the defendant at least 16 court days before the hearing. (CCP secs. 484.040, 1005(a)(1) & (b).) Further, substitute service is not deemed complete until the 10th day after mailing. (CCP sec. 415.20.) The proof of service states that the motion was served by substitute service on August 5, 2014, and therefore insufficient notice was provided. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg
